default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demo Vitally to track client health and team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Centralized Health Tracking:** Vitally can create a unified client health score by integrating data from HubSpot, Airtable, and other sources, replacing manual Notion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Capacity Planning:** The platform can quantify team capacity by assigning effort scores to projects and workstreams, enabling data-driven account redistribution.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [**AI for Efficiency:** Vitally's AI generates summaries from meeting transcripts, emails, and notes, replacing Fathom and saving significant time.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
  - [**Pricing & Trial:** The HighTouch plan (\~$43k/yr) offers unlimited full seats, addressing GrowthX's need for 50+ users. A 7-day trial with a Solutions Architect is available to de-risk the investment.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Lack of Client & Team Visibility

  - [**Client Health:** No automated way to track client health beyond deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
      - [**Need:** Indicators for sentiment, conversation patterns (e.g., repeated topics), and relationship-building activity.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Team Capacity:** No objective method to measure team workload.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Need:** A system to quantify effort and prevent burnout, replacing the current manual process in Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### Solution: Vitally Platform Features

  - [**Automated Health Score:** A customizable score pulls data from connected systems (HubSpot, Airtable via API/Zapier, Vitally surveys) to provide a holistic view.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [**Capacity Planning System:**](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Effort Scoring:** Assign points to workstreams (e.g., PSEO = 5 pts) or use formula traits to calculate effort based on activity (tasks, meetings).](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Reporting:** Dashboards visualize total effort per team member, enabling data-driven account rebalancing.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Project & Task Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
      - [**Projects:** Templatized plans with assignable tasks and discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
      - [**Custom Objects:** Create flexible objects (e.g., "Director Bi-Weekly Deliverables") to track specific work items.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [**AI for Efficiency:**](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Summaries:** One-click AI summaries of all account activity (transcripts, emails, notes).](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Prompts:** Custom prompts can analyze specific data, like ICP fit or time spent on an account.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
      - [**Call Recorder:** Replaces Fathom, saving \~$30k/yr. **Critical Question:** Does it require a client email on the invite to join?](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2654.0)

### Implementation & Pricing

  - [**Implementation:** A dedicated Solutions Architect provides a 6–8 week "teach to fish" process, not a full build-out.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2341.0)
      - [**HighTouch Plan:** \~$43,000/year.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Most cost-effective for GrowthX's needs (50+ users, 150–200 accounts). Includes unlimited full seats and all features.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)
      - [**HybridTouch Plan:** \~$40,000/year for 15 seats.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Less cost-effective for GrowthX's user volume.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
      - [Send sandbox access and resource links (Inspiration Gallery, Academy).](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
      - [Confirm if the call recorder requires a client email on the invite or if a manual override is possible.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=3677.0)
  - [**George & Andi:**](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
      - [Explore the sandbox and resources.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
      - [Meet next Thursday for feedback and to discuss a 7-day trial.](https://fathom.video/share/3nS8Wc6RcZCwLQzV_zafd_gcQ6y6q6aV?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)

action_items.description: Email George & Andi: recap, pricing, sandbox, resources; confirm recorder join/manual override; request trial scheduling
Send 1h invite for next week same time to George & Andi
